# Tier 0 Plan

## Objective
Fix a typo in one documentation paragraph so the user-facing sentence is accurate.

## Scope
In scope: edit one paragraph in one documentation file. Out of scope: code, tests, goals, subagents, runtime behavior.

## Tier decision
- Tier: 0
- Why this tier is sufficient: isolated deterministic documentation edit.
- Why this tier is not overkill: no agentic behavior, runtime, or integration risk.
- Concrete risks that justify this tier: typo regression only.

## Test plan
Manual readback of the edited paragraph is sufficient evidence for this Tier 0 documentation-only change.
